scenarios.name: Tạo bill 2.4M qua AI Quick Parse
scenarios.reason: Requires authenticated session + Telegram integration + multi-user group state. Playwright cannot auto-create 8-member group with pre-seeded bills on deployed app behind auth wall.

scenarios.name: Tạo bill mở — State A/B/C visual match
scenarios.reason: Requires authenticated group with bill creation. Bill mở UI state (US-E3-5) cannot be reached without auth + group setup. Design frame reference: i0Jex/TRcvd/nmK7P.

scenarios.name: Nhắc nợ qua Telegram — 2 người pending
scenarios.reason: Full Telegram bot interaction required. Cannot drive bot API from Playwright. Cooldown logic (24h) is server-side.

scenarios.name: Xem tổng nợ ròng trong group — toggle detail/net
scenarios.reason: Requires multi-bill group state with cross-direction debts. App redirects unauth to /login.

scenarios.name: Edit bill — payer row clickable (regression check 2026-04-18)
scenarios.reason: Edit bill flow requires auth + existing bill. Payer row clickability is a post-fix regression watch — needs auth session to validate picker sheet.

scenarios.name: Quick-add bill 180k cafe — VND format + payer default
scenarios.reason: Requires auth + AI chat input. VND format smoke test done at public surface (test #7) but full assertion needs bill card visible.

scenarios.name: Nợ ròng 2 chiều — net 255k display
scenarios.reason: Requires 2-user interaction (Minh + An bills cross-created). Multi-user state impossible on deployed auth-walled app.

scenarios.name: Chia bill không đều — guest/anonymous
scenarios.reason: Audit report flags US-E3-2 Case C/D (guest split) as missing code. Scenario expected to fail until implemented. Skipped per instruction to not waste run time on known-missing features.

scenarios.name: Settle all với Minh — 5 bills batch clear
scenarios.reason: Requires 5 pre-seeded bills + QR payment flow. Cannot automate VietQR scan or multi-bill settle without auth.

scenarios.name: History filter theo counterparty + date range
scenarios.reason: Requires 30+ transaction history. Auth-gated, data-dependent.

scenarios.name: Nhận Telegram notify → QR payment < 60s
scenarios.reason: Full Telegram → deep link → QR → bank app → confirm flow. Requires real device + Telegram bot.

scenarios.name: Check-in Bill mở — State A → B transition
scenarios.reason: Requires auth + open bill created by Minh in same group. State transition (realtime) needs 2 connected users.

scenarios.name: Verify bill breakdown — 8 participants visible
scenarios.reason: Requires auth + bill with 8 participants. L3 also flagged for half-sheet vs standalone layout regression.

scenarios.name: Leave group — history preserved after exit
scenarios.reason: Requires auth + group membership. PRD unresolved on leave-with-debt warning UX.

scenarios.name: Invite link → join group < 90s (first-time user)
scenarios.reason: Valid invite code required. Real onboarding flow needs actual group + Minh's generated invite. Playwright verified /invite/* gracefully redirects to login (test #6).
scenarios.playwright_coverage: Invite link no-500 + redirect verified (test #6); landing TTFB 884ms < 3s (test #1)

scenarios.name: Check-in Bill mở — first-timer understands UI < 10s
scenarios.reason: Cognitive/usability assertion — cannot automate human comprehension. Requires auth + bill card visible.

scenarios.name: First-time QR payment — trust signal (logo + name visible)
scenarios.reason: QR trust signal is visual assertion requiring auth + payment context.

scenarios.name: No spam after event — 14-day silent period
scenarios.reason: 14-day soak test. Cannot accelerate time. Requires monitoring Telegram notification log.

scenarios.name: Verify AI parse '1tr2' = 1.200.000 — no off-by-10x
scenarios.reason: AI parse confidence chip + edit inline requires auth + chat. No console errors on landing verified (test #15).

scenarios.name: Edit split ratio — unequal split approval flow
scenarios.reason: Audit flags US-E3-2 split edit approval as missing in code. Skipped — known incomplete feature.

scenarios.name: Reject bill — opt-out, recompute for 5 people
scenarios.reason: Reject/opt-out UI not in design frames. PO decision pending. Skipped per note in bill-skeptic-vn.md.

scenarios.name: Audit 30-day history — filter + group by counterparty
scenarios.reason: Requires 40+ transactions + auth. Export CSV is nice-to-have, not blocking.

test_2_login_auth_form: D1 partial — auth form present; auth = OTP+password, NOT Google OAuth
test_4_404_behavior: D1 — no crash on bad route
test_5_app_no_broken_state: All personas — app renders without crash
test_8_group_auth_gate: M1 partial — group URL structure + auth gate
test_11_mobile_landing: D1, D2 — mobile no horizontal overflow
test_15_no_console_errors: T1 partial — no critical JS errors on landing

key_findings.auth_method: OTP + password (NOT Google OAuth — design spec mismatch or UAT script outdated)
